name: rushee-marketplace
description: Rushee — Full-stack Spring Boot engineering discipline: Strategic DDD → Tactical DDD → FDD → API Contract → BDD → ATDD → TDD → Security → Observability

plugins.name: rushee
plugins.description: Complete engineering discipline for Spring Boot projects. 15 skills, 11 agents, 9 commands, 6 hooks. Enforces Strategic DDD, Tactical DDD, contract-first API design, BDD/ATDD/TDD, security-by-design, and production observability. Junior developers follow the full pipeline through simple prompts.
